title: Jon Dart
text: Home * People * Jon Dart Jon Dart [1] Jon Dart , an American software developer, software architect, and independent IT consultant [2] . As a chess programmer he is author of the Chess Engine Communication Protocol and UCI compatible chess engine Arasan , available to run under Windows , Linux and Mac OS [3] .
